# host_ssh_config_host (Resource)

Manages one Terraform-owned `Host` block in an OpenSSH client config file.

The provider preserves unmanaged SSH config content and writes a marked Terraform-owned block. To avoid duplicate host aliases, creation fails by default when the config already contains an unmanaged `Host` entry with the same alias. Set `adopt_existing = true` to replace that unmanaged block with the Terraform-owned block during creation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "host_ssh_key" "github" {
  path              = "~/.ssh/id_ed25519"
  comment           = "alice@example.com"
  delete_on_destroy = false
}

resource "host_ssh_config_host" "github" {
  host            = "github.com"
  hostname        = "github.com"
  user            = "git"
  identity_file   = host_ssh_key.github.path
  identities_only = true
  adopt_existing  = true

  extra_options = {
    AddKeysToAgent = "yes"
    UseKeychain    = "yes"
  }
}
```

## Import

Import an existing host entry by host alias, using `~/.ssh/config`:

```shell
terraform import host_ssh_config_host.github github.com
```

Use `<config_path>,<host>` for a non-default config path.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host` (String) Single OpenSSH `Host` pattern or alias managed by this resource, such as `github.com` or `work-bastion`.

### Optional

- `adopt_existing` (Boolean) When true, replace an existing unmanaged `Host` block with the same alias with the Terraform-managed block during create. Defaults to false.
- `config_path` (String) OpenSSH client config path. Defaults to `~/.ssh/config`.
- `extra_options` (Map of String) Additional SSH config directives rendered after first-class attributes. Keys must be directive names and values are rendered as raw directive values.
- `forward_agent` (Boolean) When set, renders `ForwardAgent yes` or `ForwardAgent no`.
- `hostname` (String) Value for the `HostName` directive.
- `identities_only` (Boolean) When set, renders `IdentitiesOnly yes` or `IdentitiesOnly no`.
- `identity_file` (String) Value for the `IdentityFile` directive. `~` is preserved in the rendered config and expanded for `identity_file_resolved`.
- `port` (Number) Value for the `Port` directive.
- `proxy_command` (String) Value for the `ProxyCommand` directive. This is rendered as a raw directive value.
- `proxy_jump` (String) Value for the `ProxyJump` directive.
- `user` (String) Value for the `User` directive.

### Read-Only

- `config_path_resolved` (String) Resolved absolute SSH config path.
- `id` (String) Provider-generated identifier for the managed SSH config block.
- `identity_file_resolved` (String) Resolved absolute identity file path, when `identity_file` is set.
- `rendered_block` (String) Last rendered Terraform-owned SSH config block. Used to detect drift.
